creator: fnoyanisi@yahoo.com
text:
Nautilus installed by GNOME3 meta package crashes all the time when the view menu (the one between the "search" and "new folder" menus) is used.

Issue causes nautilus to use 100% CPU and eventually crash. Software has been installed via pkg binaries.

System information:

nautilus-3.16.3
gnome3-3.16.2

/usr/ports % freebsd-version -k
10.2-RELEASE-p9
/usr/ports % freebsd-version -u
10.2-RELEASE-p11
/usr/ports % uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd 10.2-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p9 #0: Thu Jan 14 01:32:46 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
